meta.note: Skill identity + protection from BDO Codex (ADR 0002). Sheet has neither. Pre-awakening skills included only when they appear in awakening combos.

skills.name: Sacrum Ferit IV
skills.recommended_usage: 5s 80% crit buff with 5s cd; utilize its cooldown to the maximum. The crit prebuff opener for nearly every combo. Add-on label: "Sacrum Felt I".

tooltip_lines: Forward Guard during the skill (Nullified during cooldown)
protection.notes: FG during skill, nullified during cooldown. Sheet agrees (FG).

skills.description: Counterattack with a shield and deeply stab the enemy using lancia.
effects: Critical Hit Rate +80% for 5 sec when using the skill (Nullified during cooldown)
Forward Guard during the skill (Nullified during cooldown)
Stiffness on first hit (PvE only) (Nullified during cooldown)
Floating on last attack hits (PvE only) (Nullified during cooldown)
cc_lines: Stiffness on first hit (PvE only) (Nullified during cooldown)
Floating on last attack hits (PvE only) (Nullified during cooldown)

skills.name: Flow: Lucem Fluxum
skills.recommended_usage: Does close to no DMG. Can only be used after 3rd Sacrum Ferit hit or off hotbar. Recommended to lock if you're new to the class.
skills.description:
Preceding Skill: [Sacrum Ferit I]
Leap and detonate your Sacred Power after Sacrum Ferit.
effects: All damage applies Sacrum Ferit's level damage x2

skills.name: Purificatione III
skills.recommended_usage: 10s All-DP debuff on 6s cd. Cast only with a Promptness cancel.

protection.notes: FG, nullified during cooldown. Sheet agrees.

skills.description: Release your sacred power to damage foes and cleanse yourself.
effects: Recover 700 HP per hit (Nullified during cooldown)
All Damage Reduction -20 for 10 sec on hits (Nullified during cooldown)
Spin the target on hits (PvE only)
Stun on hits (PvE only) (Nullified during cooldown)
cc_lines: Spin the target on hits (PvE only)
Stun on hits (PvE only) (Nullified during cooldown)

skills.name: Castigatio IV
skills.recommended_usage: Main DPS tool, very low cooldown. The core skill of the kit.
skills.description: Strike your lancia into the ground repeatedly to purge enemies.

skills.name: Hastiludium III
skills.recommended_usage: Use to travel larger distances, or cast only after Blitz Stab. Add-on label: "Hastludium I".
skills.description: Valkyrie brazenly dashes forward with her lancia leading the way. The longer the dash, the faster her pace until no enemy formation can stand in her way.
effects: Knockdown on stab attack hits (PvE only)
Consumes 100 Stamina to continue the skill, then 150 Stamina to continue it once again.
The longer the dash, the greater the stab attack damage.
cc_lines: Knockdown on stab attack hits (PvE only)

skills.name: Divina Inpulsa
skills.recommended_usage: Fairly low cd. Cast only after stab skills (Blitz Stab, Hastiludium, Sacrum Ferit) or Promptness. Codex spells it "Divina Inpulsa"; roster id stays divina-impulsa.

protection.notes: FG during skill. Sheet agrees (Divina Inpulsa).

skills.description: Dash for a short distance, stab with the lancia, explode sacred power as you take your lancia back, then stab all enemies in front once more.
effects: Melee AP +32 for 10 sec when using the skill
Down Smash on last attack hits

skills.name: Verdict: Lancia Iustitiae IV
skills.recommended_usage: Long animation heavy hitter with decent AOE. Cancel with Flow: Divina Vult (LMB) or Sanctitas de Enslar (F). Want DPS? Don't cancel. Want freedom of action? Cancel.
skills.description: Slam the lancia down onto the surface to cleanse all enemies in the vicinity.
effects: All Damage Reduction +30 for 10 sec when using the skill
Movement Speed -15% for 5 sec on hits
Air Attack on last attack hits
Down Smash on last attack hits
25.8% last attack damage in PvP only
pvp_damage: 25.8% last attack damage in PvP only

skills.name: Sanctitas de Enslar III
skills.recommended_usage: 10s Melee AP buff on 9s cooldown, medium-range jump. Prime alias resolves here.

protection.notes: SA + Invincible on airborne moves -> graded top = iframe (partial). Sheet: "Iframe into SA".

skills.description: Having absorbed Enslar's Sacred Power, Valkyrie instantly teleports in the desired direction and hurls the lancia to the ground to detonate in a holy explosion.
effects: Melee AP +32 for 10 sec when using the skill
Knockdown on last attack hits (PvE only)
Moves to attack target, but performs standing attack if none targeted.
cc_lines: Knockdown on last attack hits (PvE only)

skills.name: Flow: Divina Vult
inputs: LMB or F after Sanctitas de Enslar
skills.recommended_usage: LMB always right after Sanctitas de Enslar; also LMB during Verdict to cancel it. Add-on label: "Divine Vault".
skills.description:
Preceding Skill: [Sanctitas de Enslar I]
Swing the lancia wide to send enemies flying.
effects: All Evasion -12 for 10 sec on hits

skills.name: Blitz Stab
skills.recommended_usage: Just hit something to avoid the 2nd cast.
skills.description: Perform blazingly-fast stabs with lancia's sacred power.
effects: 50 bleeding damage every 3 sec for 9 sec on hits
All Evasion -12 for 10 sec on hits

skills.name: Promptness
skills.recommended_usage: Low cooldown DPS tool. SPACE after any combat action. DPS chart typo: "Promptess".

tooltip_lines: Super Armor during the skill (Nullified during cooldown)
protection.notes: SA during skill, nullified during cooldown. Sheet agrees.

skills.description: The skilled Valkyrie is adept with switching between the sword and shield with the lancia, ready to attack at a moment's notice.
effects: Floating on LMB hits after forward Death Line Chase (PvE only)
Super Armor during the skill (Nullified during cooldown)
cc_lines: Floating on LMB hits after forward Death Line Chase (PvE only)

skills.name: Terra Sancta
skills.recommended_usage: Long cooldown, moderate DMG. Cast only after Castigatio, or from Q block (worse).
skills.description: Raising her combat senses to the limits, the Valkyrie detonates and releases her Sacred Power towards all in front of her.

skills.name: Wave of Light
skills.recommended_usage: Vacuum, worse DP debuff. Situational. Cancel with Q block or Death Line Chase backwards.
skills.description: Pull in all enemies by unleashing a wave of light before you, then deal holy damage on a designated point.
effects: All Damage Reduction -20 for 10 sec on hits
Pull in the target on hits
Movement and Attack/Casting Speeds -50% for 1 sec on pull attack hits

skills.name: Heaven's Echo III
inputs: SPACE during Q block with lancia
skills.recommended_usage: 1 min DP and accuracy buff. SPACE during a Q block with your Lancia.
skills.description:
Spread the resonant chimes of Heaven's Echo.
Draw the gaze of your foes, and receive the blessing of the heavens upon both yourself and your allies.
effects: All Accuracy +20 for 60 sec when using the skill (Nullified during cooldown)

skills.name: Death Line Chase
skills.recommended_usage: Movement; backward twice drops you into pre-awakening. Ebuff DLC: bind WW and use Death Line Chase during your e-buff instead of the running animation.

protection.notes: Codex: FG (nullified on cd) + Invincible during skill (PvE only) -> pve=iframe, pvp=fg. Sheet loosely said FG+SA; Codex authoritative.

skills.description:
Auto-learn
The Valkyrie does not falter while courting death on the front lines chasing down her foe.
effects: Character collision occurs while moving forward
No character collision while moving backward
All CC Resistance (except Grapple), including from Back Attacks
Activates Shield Chase after continuing backward Death Line Chase.
cc_lines: All CC Resistance (except Grapple), including from Back Attacks

skills.name: Guard
skills.recommended_usage: The Forward Guard block stance — the enabler for every Protected combo.

tooltip_lines: Guard Gauge damage -30% on Forward Guard. (Applies 40% with your lancia.)

skills.description:
Auto-learn
You can block using your shield and move in all directions while staying on guard.
effects: Recover 25% of Max SP on blocks
All Damage Reduction +30 for 20 sec while on Guard
All CC Resistance (except Grapple), including from Back Attacks
Guard Gauge damage -30% on Forward Guard. (Applies 40% with your lancia.)
Consumes 250 Stamina per second while sprinting on Guard.
cc_lines: All CC Resistance (except Grapple), including from Back Attacks

skills.name: Gladius Gloriae
skills.recommended_usage: Long cooldown, decent DMG. Use after Shield Chase.

tooltip_lines: Super Armor before the attack hits
protection.notes: Codex: SA before the attack hits (partial). Sheet listed none; Codex authoritative (ADR 0002). CONFLICT -> flag.

skills.description:
Prerequisite: Use the [Secret Book] Abyssal Legacy ([The Magnus] Abyssal Revelation quest reward)
Channel your Sacred Power into your sword, then smite down all foes with divine blades.
effects: Super Armor before the attack hits
All Evasion -12 for 10 sec on hits

skills.name: Absolute: Severing Light
skills.recommended_usage: Filler. Use after Gladius Gloriae.
skills.description:
Preceding Skill: [Severing Light IV]
Swing the sword to create a beam of light that slashes through darkness. Basic Valkyrie skill.

skills.name: Absolute: Celestial Spear
skills.recommended_usage: Ranged DMG, crit buff and aggro tool. Gives the crit-rate buff for nearly a whole combo.
skills.description:
Preceding Skill: [Celestial Spear IV]
Harness the Sacred Power of Elion, channeling its divine essence to unleash a mighty explosion upon the ground.
effects: Critical Hit Rate +80% for 5 sec when using the skill
Movement Speed -15% for 5 sec on hits
Can be used by canceling other skills.
Reduces casting delay If you cancel a skill.

skills.name: Absolute: Counter
skills.recommended_usage: Counter after Shield Chase into Shield Throw into Celestial Spear into Shield Throw — a cancel chain worth learning.
skills.description:
Preceding Skill: [Counter III]
Damage enemies with a strong upward strike, lifting them into the air.
effects: Push the target on hits (PvE only)

skills.name: Absolute: Just Counter
skills.recommended_usage: Catch from Guard only, hotbar otherwise.

tooltip_lines: Forward Guard during the skill (Nullified during cooldown)
protection.notes: FG during skill, nullified on cd. Sheet agrees.

skills.description:
Preceding Skill: [Just Counter III]
Quickly stab your foes from a stable stance.
effects: 30 bleeding damage every 3 sec for 18 sec on hits
Forward Guard during the skill (Nullified during cooldown)
Stiffness on hits (PvE only) (Nullified during cooldown)
cc_lines: Stiffness on hits (PvE only) (Nullified during cooldown)

skills.name: Absolute: Shield Throw
skills.recommended_usage: Part of the Counter / Shield Throw / Celestial Spear cancel chain.
skills.description:
Preceding Skill: [Shield Throw II]
Toss your shield filled with SP to attack faraway enemies.
effects: Push the target on hits (PvE only)
Spin the target on hits (PvE only)
cc_lines: Spin the target on hits (PvE only)

skills.name: Shield Chase IV
skills.recommended_usage: Engage / movement. Swaps to pre-awakening (Shift+A/D).

protection.notes: Codex: FG + Invincible (PvE only) -> pve=iframe, pvp=fg. Sheet said FG+SA; Codex authoritative.

skills.description: Quickly move in all directions while staying on guard.
effects: Character collision occurs while moving forward
No character collision while moving backward
All CC Resistance (except Grapple), including from Back Attacks
Cooldown mutually exclusive with other Shield Chase levels
cc_lines: All CC Resistance (except Grapple), including from Back Attacks

skills.name: Absolute: Sharp Light
skills.recommended_usage: Pre-awakening re-CC.
skills.description:
Preceding Skill: [Sharp Light IV]
Create a sharp, powerful Elionian light and throw it toward enemies in front of you.
effects: Push the target on hits (PvE only)

skills.name: Absolute: Punishment
skills.recommended_usage: Grab catch; works in awakening. (Lock it if you're a Marni-only grinder.)

protection.notes: SA on Grapple. Sheet agrees (SA on Grapple).

skills.description:
Preceding Skill: [Punishment IV]
Grapple the enemy and smash them down to the ground.
effects: Not affected by effects which increase/decrease Attack and/or Casting Speeds.

skills.name: Absolute: Divine Power
skills.recommended_usage: Down-smash fishing and finisher damage.
skills.description:
Preceding Skill: [Divine Power IV]
Harness the Sacred Power of Elion, channeling its divine essence to unleash a mighty explosion upon the ground.
effects: Attack Speed -10% for 5 sec on hits
Casting Speed -10% for 5 sec on hits

skills.name: Absolute: Flying Kick
skills.recommended_usage: Extra-damage filler in the Blitz Stab Double-KD variant.
skills.description:
Preceding Skill: [Flying Kick II]
Deal damage to foes with a flying kick.
effects: Push the target on hits (PvE only)

skills.name: Celestial Smite
skills.recommended_usage: Rabam. Pulls and bounds; pairs with Absolute: Celestial Spear for a strong cancel.
skills.description:
Preceding Skill: [Heaven's Echo III]
Preceding Skill: [Celestial Spear IV]
Drop sacred and mighty spears from the skies to inflict powerful damage.
effects: Critical Hit Rate +80% for 5 sec when using the skill
Movement Speed -15% for 5 sec on hits
Pull in the target on hits (PvE only)

skills.name: Divine Descent
skills.recommended_usage: Rabam. DP buff for self and allies. Shares the Shift+Z input with Divine Slam (loadout choice).
skills.description:
Preceding Skill: [Divine Power IV]
Preceding Skill: [Elion's Blessing]
The holy blessing of Elion grants a boon to your allies and self.
effects: All Damage Reduction +40 for 20 sec (Applied to self and allies)
All Special Attack damage +2% for 10 sec (Applied to self and allies)

skills.name: Divine Judgment of Light
skills.recommended_usage: Rabam finisher; needs Celestial Spear/Smite off cooldown.
skills.description:
Preceding Skill: [Judgment of Light III]
Preceding Skill: [Divine Power IV]
Gather the power of light, then rain down a holy spear from the heavens.
effects: Attack Speed -10% for 5 sec on hits
Casting Speed -10% for 5 sec on hits

skills.name: Divine Slam
skills.recommended_usage: Rabam down-smash fishing. Distinct from Divine Descent though both bind Shift+Z.

protection.notes: FG during skill. Distinct from Divine Descent (SA), same input Shift+Z.

skills.description:
Preceding Skill: [Divine Power IV]
Preceding Skill: [Sword of Judgment IV]
Imbue your longsword with the Sacred Power of Elion, then deal a powerful blow to all enemies in front.

skills.name: Noble Spirit
skills.recommended_usage: Our E-buff; can only be cast from a quick slot.

protection.notes: SA during skill / FG while sprinting -> graded top SA. Sheet: FG+SA while sprinting.

skills.description: A noble spirit stirs within, and the Valkyrie grows ever mightier.
effects: All Damage Reduction +50 for 30 sec when using the skill
Casting Speed +10% for 30 sec when using the skill
HP Recovery +200 for 30 sec when using the skill
Only backward Death Line Chase available.
All CC Resistance (except Grapple), including from Back Attacks
Consume no Stamina for 30 sec while sprinting.
cc_lines: All CC Resistance (except Grapple), including from Back Attacks

skills.name: Shining Dash
skills.recommended_usage: Useful for chasing people in duels; can only be cast from a quick slot.

tooltip_lines: Forward Guard at the start of the skill and while moving
protection.notes: FG at start and while moving. Quick-slot.

skills.description:
Harnessing the Sacred Power of Elion, unleash a devastating dash attack.
Bathed in resplendent light, the Valkyrie, wielding the Sacred Power, dashes towards her foes up to three times in swift succession.
effects: Forward Guard at the start of the skill and while moving
Push the target on attack 1 hits (PvE only)

skills.name: Elion's Blessing
skills.recommended_usage: Our PA (protected ability); can only be cast from a quick slot.
skills.description: Blanket Elion's protection around you to temporarily raise the DP of self and allies.
effects: Damage Reduction Rate +50% for 6 sec to self and nearby allies
